Package controller

package controller
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    Auth
    Authentication controller class that handles user registration, login, and user retrieval operations.
    BudgetingAnalysis
    Controller class for the Budgeting Analysis view.
    BudgetTracker
    A singleton controller class that manages budget tracking operations in the system.
    Dashboard
    Controller class for the Dashboard view in the personal finance application.
    Dashboard.BudgetViewModel
    View Model class for Budgets in the UI.
    Dashboard.DisplayReminder
    DisplayReminder class for showing reminders in the UI.
    Dashboard.Transaction
    Internal class representing a transaction for display purposes in the UI.
    ExpenseTracker
    ExpenseTracker implements the Tracker interface to manage user expenses.
    ExpenseTrackerController
    Controller class for the Expense Tracker application that manages the UI interactions and connects the model with the view.
    HomePage
    Controller class for the application's home page.
    IncomeTrackingController
    Controller class for the Income Tracking interface.
    Login
    Controller class for the application login view.
    NavBar
    Controller class for the navigation bar component in the application.
    Reminders
    Controller for the Reminders view.
    ReminderTracker
    Singleton class for managing reminders in the system.
    SavingsGoals
    Controller class for the Savings Goals view.
    SignUp
    Controller class for the Sign Up page in a JavaFX application.
